papers.title: High-Precision Dam Deformation Monitoring Using Advanced InSAR Techniques: A Review
papers.journal: Journal of Civil Engineering and Construction
papers.abstract_snippet: Interferometric Synthetic Aperture Radar (InSAR) has become a key technology for high-precision dam deformation monitoring, offering millimeter-level accuracy, broad spatial coverage, and all-weather operability.
